title: Cogni Workspace Theme Manifest v1.0
description: Manifest schema for Theme System v2 themes. A theme directory MAY ship a manifest.json conforming to this schema; absence is valid (tier-0 themes). Reserved keys 'live', 'live_within_session', and 'copy' are forbidden in v1.0 and reserved for Phase 3.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Currently only '1.0' is recognised.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in pickers and dashboards.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier matching the theme directory name.

tiers.description: Tiers the theme exposes. Every tier is optional; a theme with an empty tiers object is valid (advisory metadata only).

tokens.description: Path to the tokens directory (typically 'tokens/'). JSON is canonical; tokens.css is generated.

assets.description: Path to the assets directory (logos, fonts, raster art).

components.description: Component primitive directories keyed by surface family. HTML is canonical; JSX is permitted alongside HTML.

templates.description: Template files keyed by surface (deck, report, landing, dashboard).

showcase.description: Optional path to a showcase artifact (e.g. a JSX or HTML preview).

voice_ref.description: Optional pointer into theme.md (e.g. '#voice--copy-guidelines') for skills consuming voice content. Voice rules stay in theme.md in v1.0; the 'copy' tier is reserved for Phase 3.
